zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Umfraville於大約1383年出生在英國諾圖波藍德時，她的父親Sir Thomas Umfraville II24歲，母親Agnes Grey20歲。她於大約1404年與Sir William Ryther II在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1435年1月4日在英國享年53歲，埋葬在英國越可爾希亞活。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud Umfraville于大约1383年出生在英国諾圖波藍德时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Umfraville II24岁，母亲Agnes Grey20岁。她于大约1404年与Sir William Ryther II在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1435年1月4日在英国享年53岁，埋葬在英国越可爾希亞活。

nameMeanings.name: Umfraville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Umfreville (La Manche) or Offranville (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Umfraville was born about 1383, in Northumberland, England, her father, Sir Thomas Umfraville II, was 24 and her mother, Agnes Grey, was 20. She married Sir William Ryther II about 1404, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 4 January 1435, in England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Harewood, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Umfraville est née environ 1383, à Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Umfraville II, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Agnes Grey, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Ryther II environ 1404, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 4 janvier 1435, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Harewood, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud Umfraville um 1383 in Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Umfraville II 24 und ihre Mutter Agnes Grey 20. Sie hat um 1404 in Yorkshire, England Sir William Ryther II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 4. Januar 1435 im Alter von 53 Jahren in England und wurde in Harewood, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Umfraville è nata il circa 1383 nel Northumberland, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Umfraville II, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Agnes Grey, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Ryther II circa 1404, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 4 gennaio 1435, nel England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Harewood, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud Umfravilleが約1383年にイギリスノースウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Umfraville IIは24歳，母Agnes Greyは20歳であった。約1404年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでSir William Ryther IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1435年1月4日にイギリスで53歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Umfraville(이)가 대략 1383년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Umfraville II(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Grey(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1404년 영국 요르크실르에서 Sir William Ryther II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1435년 1월 4일 영국에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 하레우드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Umfraville nasceu aproximadamente 1383, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Umfraville II, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Grey, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Ryther II aproximadamente 1404, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 4 de janeiro de 1435, em Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Umfraville родилась около 1383 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Umfraville II было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Grey, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Ryther II около 1404 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 4 января 1435 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности харюуд, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud Umfraville nació aproximadamente 1383, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Umfraville II, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Agnes Grey, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir William Ryther II aproximadamente 1404, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 4 de enero de 1435, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
